CVE-2025-11014.title: A security flaw has been discovered in OGRECave Ogre up to 14.4.1 ...
CVE-2025-11014.description: A security flaw has been discovered in OGRECave Ogre up to 14.4.1. This issue affects the function STBIImageCodec::encode of the file /ogre/PlugIns/STBICodec/src/OgreSTBICodec.cpp of the component Image Handler. The manipulation results in heap-based buffer overflow. The attack is only possible with local access. The exploit has been released to the public and may be exploited.

CVE-2025-11015.title: A weakness has been identified in OGRECave Ogre up to 14.4.1. Imp ...
CVE-2025-11015.description: A weakness has been identified in OGRECave Ogre up to 14.4.1. Impacted is the function STBIImageCodec::encode of the file /ogre/PlugIns/STBICodec/src/OgreSTBICodec.cpp. This manipulation causes mismatched memory management routines. The attack is restricted to local execution. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be exploited.

CVE-2025-11017.title: A vulnerability was detected in OGRECave Ogre up to 14.4.1. The i ...
CVE-2025-11017.description: A vulnerability was detected in OGRECave Ogre up to 14.4.1. The impacted element is the function Ogre::LogManager::stream of the file /ogre/OgreMain/src/OgreLogManager.cpp. Performing manipulation of the argument mDefaultLog results in null pointer dereference. The attack must be initiated from a local position. The exploit is now public and may be used.
